message:
fix(connectors): minor quality improvements across DockerHub, GitLab, Sentry, Anna's Archive

DockerHub: Simplify login call by unwrapping runtime directly instead of
matching on Option (runtime is always present at login time). Fix serde
attributes on Organization type — use #[serde(default)] instead of
conflicting aliases for id/orgname fields.

GitLab: Replace qualified GitLabError:: calls with Self:: in the
ConnectorErrorMapping impl for idiomatic Rust style.

Sentry: Replace map_or(false, ...) with is_some_and(..) for cleaner
boolean checks. Simplify update_issue operation schema by removing
fields (assignedTo, hasSeen, isBookmarked, isSubscribed) that aren't
part of the first-slice API surface and expanding substatus docs.

Anna's Archive: Remove unused retry_config field from client struct
and construction — retries are handled at the runtime layer.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -133,9 +133,9 @@ pub struct TagImage {
 
 #[derive(Debug, Clone, Deserialize, Serialize)]
 pub struct Organization {
-    #[serde(alias = "orgname")]
+    #[serde(default)]
     pub id: String,
-    #[serde(default, alias = "orgname")]
+    #[serde(default)]
     pub orgname: Option<String>,
     #[serde(default)]
     pub full_name: Option<String>,
